_note: Canon 銀河英雄伝説Ⅶ (gin7) military RANK ladder, 14 rungs per faction. CONVENTION: id is the wire value written to the character record's rank field (u16 @0xd6 per entity-catalog-re; faction-split Imperial vs Alliance). id 1 = LOWEST rung, id 14 = HIGHEST (元帥/Marshal); higher id = higher rank, so a >= comparison gives seniority. id is faction-LOCAL: id=14 means 元帥 in BOTH ladders, but id=1 differs (Empire 兵長 vs Alliance 軍曹). The server must therefore key rank lookups by (faction, id), and when it sets rank@0xd6 it writes this id together with the character's faction. Source: content/roster/manual-roster.json rankLadderMilitary (gin7 manual, 20-rung full enlisted+officer ladder) collapsed to the 14 playable officer/NCO rungs the games expose. The two ladders diverge by canon: the Empire (帝国) has 上級大将 (Senior Admiral, a rung the Alliance lacks) but a shallower enlisted floor (兵長); the Alliance (同盟) has no 上級大将 yet a deeper NCO floor (曹長/軍曹), so each side lands on exactly 14. The legacy src/server/logh7-character-gen.mjs RANKS[] held 11 EN strings (Ensign..Marshal); this table is the authoritative 14-rung replacement — name_en romanizations align with those where they overlap. Quota rule (manual): 元帥5 / 上級大将5[帝国のみ] / 大将10 / 中将20 / 少将40 / 准将80; 大佐 and below uncapped.
